title: Update Learning Resources Link to Support Hub
description: Update the Learning Resources link in the application to point to the new support hub at `https://datatoolspro.com/support/` instead of the previous destination. This ensures users are directed to the consolidated support and documentation page.
acceptance_criteria: The Learning Resources link points to https://datatoolspro.com/support/
The link opens correctly from wherever it is referenced in the application
ux_changes: Learning Resources link updated to point to the new support hub URL.
implementation_notes: Simple URL update deployed to staging for review.
comment_summary: Developer completed the change on staging and submitted for review.
